privileged_info_summary: This is a credential sanitization task in FreeScout (an open-source help desk system). The task requires an agent to locate and sanitize a leaked database password 'ProductionPass2024!' that appears in a ticket note within the 'DevOps Support' mailbox under the ticket subject 'Production DB Latency'. The password appears within a PostgreSQL connection string (postgres://admin:ProductionPass2024!@10.0.0.5:5432/prod) and must be replaced with the redaction marker '[REDACTED]'. The note must be preserved (not deleted) as the audit trail must remain intact.
